scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite build -c vite.main.config.ts --watch" "vite build -c vite.preload.config.ts --watch" "wait-on dist/main/index.js dist/preload/index.js && electron ."
scripts.build: tsc && vite build -c vite.main.config.ts && vite build -c vite.preload.config.ts
scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter @nanomail/shared build && pnpm --filter @nanomail/backend build && pnpm --filter @nanomail/frontend build && pnpm build
scripts.copy-release: rm -rf release && mkdir -p release && cp -r /tmp/nanomail-electron-release/* release/ && rm -rf release/mac-universal-*-temp
